summary: Verified all bug fixes from iteration 4 - Chart Terminal renders correctly (no Objects error), Backtest Lab shows NSE symbols, News page shows BTC-USD format. All 5 features tested and working.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 403 error - appears to be Kubernetes ingress limitation for preview environment

working_endpoints: GET /api/market/price/{symbol} - Real yfinance prices working (RELIANCE.NS: $1419.40, BTC-USD: $67331.58)
GET /api/market/symbols - 200+ NSE stocks with correct format

context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working. Chart Terminal renders candlestick chart correctly for RELIANCE.NS (fixed 'Objects not valid as React child' error). Backtest Lab symbol dropdown shows NSE stocks (RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, etc.) not old BTCUSD. News & Sentiment page shows BTC-USD and ETH-USD format (correct for yfinance). Dashboard shows real market prices. WebSocket for live updates has 403 issue in preview environment but core functionality works.

chart_terminal_objects_error.evidence: Chart renders candlestick data correctly for RELIANCE.NS, no React errors found
chart_terminal_objects_error.fix_location: frontend/src/pages/ChartTerminalPage.js - line 27 extracts symbol strings from objects

backtest_lab_btcusd_symbols.evidence: Dropdown shows NSE symbols: RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, INFY, ICICIBANK, HINDUNILVR, SBIN
backtest_lab_btcusd_symbols.fix_location: frontend/src/pages/BacktestLabPage.js - line 58 extracts symbol strings from API response

news_sentiment_btcusd_format.evidence: Page shows BTC-USD and ETH-USD format (correct yfinance format)

market_data_real_prices.evidence: API returns real prices: RELIANCE.NS=$1419.40, BTC-USD=$67331.58, ETH-USD=$1955.17

dashboard_market_overview.evidence: Dashboard shows real NSE stock prices and crypto prices in correct format

mocked_apis.news_feed: Static mock headlines for Indian market news
mocked_apis.sentiment_analysis: Uses keyword-based fallback (HuggingFace API requires authentication)
